---
title: "proof_of_concept.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\contracts\proof_of_concept.py"
loc: 9
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.18
style_score: 4.25
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.18
---

## Intent
The `proof_of_concept.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestContract_example, setUp, test_transition. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestContract_example, setUp, test_transition. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.2/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)

### Exports
- `TestContract_example`
- `setUp`
- `test_transition`
